# releaseComplete

[ALPHA] Marks a release as completed. If version is provided, completes that specific release; otherwise completes the most recent started release.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`ReleasePayload`](../objects/release_payload-object.md)!

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `input` | [`ReleaseCompleteInput`](../input-objects/release_complete_input-input.md)! | `n/a` | No | The input containing the pipeline ID and optional version. |
